title: Hornet Removal in Sleepy Hollow, NY | $350-$550 | Best Pest Control NYC
metaDescription: Professional hornet removal services in Sleepy Hollow, Westchester. Safe elimination of hornet nests from historic homes & properties. Call today for $350-$550 flat-rate service.
intro: Sleepy Hollow's historic homes and tree-lined streets provide ideal nesting spots for hornets, creating dangerous situations for residents and visitors. Best Pest Control NYC offers professional hornet removal services throughout Sleepy Hollow, protecting families in this charming Westchester village. Our experienced technicians safely eliminate hornet nests from properties near the Old Dutch Church, along the Hudson River, and throughout residential neighborhoods.
whyUs: Best Pest Control NYC brings over 15 years of experience serving Westchester communities like Sleepy Hollow with safe, effective hornet removal. Our licensed technicians understand the unique challenges of treating historic properties and wooded estates, using proven methods that protect your family, pets, and the architectural integrity of your home.
localContext: Sleepy Hollow's mature trees, historic structures, and proximity to the Hudson River create perfect conditions for hornet colonies to thrive, especially around properties near Philipsburg Manor and along Route 9. The village's blend of 18th-century homes and modern residences requires careful, customized pest control approaches that respect both architectural heritage and resident safety.

faqs.question: How quickly can you remove a hornet nest in Sleepy Hollow?
faqs.answer: We offer same-day or next-day hornet removal service throughout Sleepy Hollow. Once you contact us, we'll schedule an appointment within 24 hours in most cases. The actual removal typically takes 1-2 hours depending on nest location and size, ensuring your property is safe quickly.

faqs.question: What's included in the $350-$550 hornet removal price?
faqs.answer: Our flat-rate pricing includes complete inspection, safe nest removal, treatment of the affected area to prevent re-infestation, and disposal of the nest. The price varies based on nest size, location accessibility (ground level vs. high eaves), and severity of infestation. We provide upfront pricing with no hidden fees.

faqs.question: Is hornet removal safe for historic Sleepy Hollow homes?
faqs.answer: Absolutely. We specialize in treating historic properties throughout Sleepy Hollow and Westchester. Our technicians use targeted application methods that eliminate hornets without damaging original woodwork, siding, or architectural features. We take extra care around older structures to preserve their integrity while ensuring complete pest elimination.

faqs.question: What's the difference between hornets, wasps, and yellow jackets?
faqs.answer: Hornets are larger than wasps and yellow jackets, typically building large, paper-like nests in trees or under eaves. They're more aggressive when defending their nests and their stings are more painful. Yellow jackets often nest in ground cavities or wall voids, while paper wasps build smaller, open-comb nests. Our technicians identify the species and use appropriate removal methods for each.
